name: 5"x7" Shaped Resin Profile Table Image Frame Beige - Threshold™: Modern Style, Glass, Polyresin
description:
Elevate your decor with this chic 5"x7" Shaped Resin Profile Table Image Frame Beige by Threshold™. Crafted from resilient resin with hand-painted accents, it exudes style. Display your memories horizontally or vertically with its versatile design. Enjoy easy placement with the freestanding mount. A modern touch for any space.


Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
